title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion hosts REX workshop May 13-14 at Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC. Focus on twin screw extrusion systems.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and collaboration in polymer technology, benefiting local manufacturing and research.

title: Suspect Arrested in Charlotte Grocery Store Stabbing
summary: Woman with criminal background arrested for stabbing pregnant woman in Charlotte grocery store parking lot after two weeks on the run.
charlotte_impact: Addresses public safety concerns and highlights the importance of law enforcement efforts.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about repeat offenders and the effectiveness of the justice system.

title: Braylon Clark Details Visit with Tennessee Football
summary: 2028 North Carolina WR Braylon Clark visits Knoxville, Tennessee. The Charlotte Country Day athlete enjoyed his visit.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local talent and provides insight into college recruiting processes.

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
summary: Guide on selecting a deck builder in Charlotte. Highlights benefits of adding a deck: expands living space, enhances enjoyment, increases value.
charlotte_impact: Offers practical advice for homeowners looking to improve their property.

title: Students Design Brand for Brown Museum
summary: Students design brand for Charlotte Hawkins Brown's Canary Cottage museum in Guilford County NC, which is 100 years old.
charlotte_impact: Connects education with local history and preservation efforts.

title: FG Nexus CEO to Speak at FII Priority Miami 2026
summary: FG Nexus CEO Maja Vujinovic to co-chair digital assets conclave and speak on stablecoins panel at FII Priority Miami 2026.
charlotte_impact: Highlights Charlotte's presence in the digital assets and finance industry.

title: Man Killed After Being Hit by Blue Line Train
summary: Man killed after being hit by Blue Line train in Charlotte. The victim was found unresponsive near the tracks.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about transit safety and pedestrian awareness.

title: Homicide Investigation in Northwest Charlotte
summary: Police investigating a homicide after a report of a shooting into an occupied home in northwest Charlotte on Saturday night.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community safety and the impact of gun violence.

title: One Person Killed After Reported Home Invasion Attempt
summary: Statesville police report one person killed during a home invasion attempt that happened during daylight hours on Saturday.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risk of home invasions and the importance of home security.

title: Power Restored for Most Duke Energy Customers
summary: Power restored for most Duke Energy customers; some scattered outages remain, primarily in the University Area of Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses infrastructure reliability and the impact of outages on residents.

title: MPTA Chairman Focuses on Safety
summary: MPTA chairman emphasizes safety as the 'number one' priority as the new transit authority takes shape in Charlotte. Bus system changes coming.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of safety in public transportation planning.

title: Cold Front Brings Rain and Cooler Temperatures
summary: A cold front will bring showers and breezy conditions to the Carolinas on Sunday, impacting weather conditions.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather updates relevant to daily life and activities.

title: Driver Rescued After Car Rollover
summary: Driver rescued after car rolled over in crash in east Charlotte around 1 p.m. on Decapolis Drive. No fatalities reported.
charlotte_impact: Highlights traffic safety and emergency response efforts.

title: I-85 North Reopens After Crash
summary: I-85 North in Gaston County reopens after a crash blocked all lanes at Exit 27 on Saturday morning. Significant traffic delays.
charlotte_impact: Informs commuters about traffic disruptions and road safety.
